short_definition: The structured health and endpoint posture projection for a live runtime session.
description: RuntimeHealthPosture is the compact first-class projection that summarizes NARS health and event-stream discovery without dumping the raw session stream into launch banners. It carries endpoint, status, and operational posture information that agent-cli and agent-web-ui can render consistently.
boundaries: Not the provider API call result.

authority.notes: The agent-start launcher materializes the posture projection and the renderer consumes it.

confidence.basis: The launcher now materializes and renders the posture projection directly.
